real agent chat
How It Works

Three steps to your first agent

1

Choose Your Expert

Pick the function you need filled. Each agent comes pre-trained with real domain expertise from industry specialists. Like hiring a senior professional on day one.

2

Train on Your Business

In a private session, we map your business context, your standards and the way you work directly into the agent. It understands your world before it starts.

3

Deploy

Your agent goes live on Telegram, WhatsApp, wherever you work. Every decision it makes is visible and auditable. You check the work. It sharpens over time.

Choose Your Department

What do you need done?

Choose the role you need your agent to fill, then we custom train it on your specific business needs.

Marketing

Agents trained to plan, execute and optimise your marketing across channels.
Available roles

Content Marketing Manager

Plans, scripts and produces content across platforms. Knows your voice, your audience and your strategy.

Campaign Strategist

Designs and runs marketing campaigns. Tracks performance and optimises spend.

Social Media Manager

Manages your social presence, schedules posts, engages your audience and grows your following.

Every agent is trainable. These aren't static tools. Each agent runs on structured thinking protocols that can be trained, refined and evolved as your business grows. You can see exactly how it thinks.
$2.5K AUD*
*Per agent. Separate ongoing costs for API usage and cloud hosting apply.

Transparency

See into the machine

Every agent runs on a visible thinking protocol. You can see exactly how it arrives at every decision. No black box. No guesswork. Just structured, auditable thinking you can inspect, challenge and improve.

This is what makes our agents different. They don't just produce outputs. They show their working.

FAQ

Common questions.

Do I need technical skills?

No. We handle the entire build. You bring the business knowledge and we install it.

How does the agent know my business?

We run a private session with you to map your context, your thinking and your standards. That gets installed directly into the agent from day one.

How long does it take?

Most agents are live in 2 to 3 weeks from first consultation.

What if I want more than one agent?

Each agent is $2.5K. We design them to work together as a team when you're ready to scale.

Where does the agent live?

Cloud by default with minimal monthly costs. Or locally on your own hardware for full isolation. Your choice.

How do I talk to it?

Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack, email, a dashboard. We set up the interface that fits your life.
